name: Laeral's Silver Lance
description: Silver energy bursts out from you in a 120-foot-long, 5-foot-wide line. Each creature of your choice in the line makes a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 3d10 Force damage and has the Prone condition. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only. When using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 1d10 for every spell slot level above 3.
